Variables.Name: Id
Variables.Description: GUID used to track changes to the source data.

Variables.Name: NumMips
Variables.Description: Number of mips provided as source data for the texture.

Variables.Name: bPNGCompressed
Variables.Description: RGBA8 source data is optionally compressed as PNG.

Variables.Name: bGuidIsHash
Variables.Description: Legacy textures use a hash instead of a GUID.

Variables.Name: Format
Variables.Description: Format in which the source data is stored.
